turns.text: Please finish the metrics review for me.
I can, but I still need one missing detail. No rush, but I still need the missing detail.
Which dataset or source of truth should I use?
If you go quiet, I'll check back in 585 seconds so we don't stay blocked.
I'm still stuck on this sign-in problem.
Please try the two steps I just outlined and send me the result.
If it stays broken, I'll follow up 332 seconds from now so this doesn't stall.
I'm trying to finish the outreach list.
Okay, what kind of check-in would help?
If I haven't done the outreach list by in 3457 seconds, please follow up.
Will do. I'll check back around in 3457 seconds if I still haven't heard that it's done.
If I still have not sent the deck by tomorrow morning, follow up.
Understood. I will check back tomorrow morning if it is still missing.
Prod is still down after the restart.
Keep checking the worker logs and the failing job queue.
If I do not hear back, I will check in again in 37 seconds.
我接下来一直开会，今晚别再找我。
明白，我先停在这里，等你之后再回来。
